LC1-headword-not-in-shown-definition.rule: term-match items are dropped and substituted when the shown definition contains the headword (word-boundary, case-insensitive); control concepts violating it are excluded at selection

LC3-false-claim-not-entailed.rule: false claims must not be a substring of the target gloss and must have token-Jaccard < 0.5 vs the target gloss

note: fail-closed: any violation aborts the build; this file exists only on PASS
